name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Men's ANDIAMO Shoulder Bag. The undisputed star of Bottega Veneta is the Andiamo. The first new favorite of 2025 is this exclusive men's bag with a unique buckle. The designer has clearly incorporated many clever details. The detachable shoulder strap is very convenient for office elites to carry work logs and office supplies, reducing the burden in their hands. The interior features two large compartments and one small zippered compartment. Unlike the women's version, the compartments here are not detachable. The fixed large single layer makes it easy to go out for work lightly and avoid piling up too many small items.
